description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has three jobs: lint, build, and test. The lint job checks code formatting using black on ubuntu-latest. The build job sets up Python 3.10 on ubuntu-latest, installs dependencies, builds a package, and publishes it to PyPI if the push event is a tag. The test job runs a matrix of tests across multiple Python versions and operating systems, including Ubuntu and Windows, with various Visual Studio versions on Windows.
